(parse-long "999999999999999")
;;=> 999999999999999
(* 1000000000 1000000)
;;=> 1000000000000000
(+ 9999999999999 9999999999999)
;;=> 19999999999998
(- 0 999999999999999)
;;=> -999999999999999
(- 999999999999999 999999999999998)
;;=> 1
9999999999999999
;;=> 9999999999999999
5N
;;=> 5N
(bigint 5)
;;=> 5N
(bigint 999999999999999)
;;=> 999999999999999N
(quot 10000000000000000 3)
;;=> 3333333333333333
(quot 10000000000000000N 3)
;;=> 3333333333333333N
(quot 7/2 1)
;;=> 3N
(/ 20000000000000000 2)
;;=> 10000000000000000
(rem 10000000000000000 3)
;;=> 1
(mod 10000000000000000 7)
;;=> 4
(long 5N)
;;=> 5
(= 999999999999999N (parse-long "999999999999999"))
;;=> true
(= (hash 999999999999999N) (hash (parse-long "999999999999999")))
;;=> true
(instance? Long (parse-long "999999999999999"))
;;=> true
(instance? Long 5N)
;;=> false
(instance? clojure.lang.BigInt 5N)
;;=> true
(even? 1000000000000000)
;;=> true
(odd? 999999999999999)
;;=> true
(parse-long "100")
;;=> 100
99999999999999999999
;;=> 99999999999999999999N
(inc 999999999999998)
;;=> 999999999999999
(dec 1000000000000000)
;;=> 999999999999999
(abs -999999999999999)
;;=> 999999999999999
(max 999999999999999 5)
;;=> 999999999999999
